title: Fix shared memory bank checkpoint crash
summary: SparseMemoryBank is shared across all 32 layers (same object). HF Trainer sees 'shared tensors' and crashes on checkpoint save. Need to refactor to use per-layer independent memory banks.
proposed_solution: Option 1: Modify SparseMemoryBank to be per-layer only (remove num_layers, each instance manages one layer). Option 2: Create 32 independent SparseMemoryBank instances (one per layer). Option 3: Use custom save/load logic to deduplicate memory banks.
recommended_approach: Option 2: Create independent memory bank per layer in training script, pass to each ConcatFusionAttention. Simplest and least disruptive.
estimated_impact: Enables checkpoint saving for all sparse memory experiments. No functional changes to training behavior.
